description:
## Question

Does the cask-installed SuperWhisper ship the hook binary the reference relies on, and how do we invoke it from a Nix-generated hook command?

Confirm:
- Exact path (reference hardcodes /Applications/superwhisper.app/Contents/Resources/claude-hook) and whether the cask installs to /Applications.
- What it reads from stdin (the Claude Code hook JSON payload) and what it does (fires superwhisper://agent-update deeplink? opens the app?).
- Minimum SuperWhisper version (README says 2.13+).
- Whether the binary honors the per-project disable flag (/tmp/superwhisper-agent/disabled-<md5(pwd)>) and/or SUPERWHISPER_AGENT=0, or whether those are display-only in the reference statusline. This determines whether the toggle skill actually gates behavior.
- Any TCC/permission prerequisites (mic, accessibility).

Inspect the locally-installed app if present. AFK research; produce a linked markdown summary.
title: Verify SuperWhisper's claude-hook binary and its interface
